tech_stack.styling: Custom CSS with CSS variables for theming; no framework needed
libraries: Feather Icons via CDN (lightweight SVG icons)
Smooth scroll polyfill if needed for older browsers

file_plan.purpose: Single-page app with navigation anchors to Home, About, Services, Pricing, Contact sections; includes reusable header and footer
Global styles, responsive grid/flexbox layout, color palette (corporate blue/teal accents, neutral grays), typography hierarchy, card components, form styles, mobile-first breakpoints
Smooth navigation between sections, active nav state tracking, lightweight form validation and localStorage save, scroll-to-section handlers, mobile menu toggle
Setup instructions (no build step needed), deployment guide (Netlify/Vercel/GitHub Pages), customization tips for colors/copy, optional form backend integration notes
Project manifest with metadata, dependencies, build mode, and deployment configuration

design_notes: Modern corporate aesthetic: use a restrained palette (navy/teal primary, light gray backgrounds, white cards), generous whitespace, and strong typography (serif headlines, sans-serif body). Every section uses card-based layouts with subtle box shadows and hover states. CTAs are consistently styled and prominent. Mobile navigation uses a toggle menu. Placeholder imagery uses SVG gradients or simple geometric shapes to convey professionalism without external assets. Sticky header with logo and nav aids navigation on long pages.
